doc.body:
1.map()

function newMap(arr, fn){
  const newArr = [];
  for(let i = 0; i < arr.length;i++){
    newArr.push(fn(arr[i], i, arr))
  }
  return newArr;
}

const arr = [1,2,3];
let a = newMap(arr, function(a){
  return a * 2
})
console.log(a)
Array.prototype.map2 = function(fn, ...args){
  const ret = [];
  for(let i = 0; i < this.length;i++){
    ret.push(fn(this[i], i, ...args))
  }
  return ret
}
let b = arr.map2(function(item){
  return item * 3
})
console.log('map2', b) //[3, 6, 9]

2.new操作符

function new2(fn, ...arges){
  const obj = {}
  Object.setPrototypeOf(obj, fn.prototype)
  const ret = fn.apply(obj, arges)
  return ret instanceof Object ? ret : obj
}
function Test(name){
  this.name = name
}
const ret = new2(Test, 'radish');
console.log(ret); //radish
function Test(name){
  this.name = name
}
Test.prototype.sayName = function(){
  console.log(this.name)
}
function new2(fn,...args){   
  // ...args为ES6展开符,也可以使用arguments
  //先用Object创建一个空的对象,
  //fn.prototype代表 用当前对象的原型去创建
  const obj = Object.create(fn.prototype) 
  const rel = fn.apply(obj, args)
  return rel instanceof Object ? rel : obj
}
var newTest = new2(Test,'radish')
newTest.sayName(); // radish

3.JSON.stringify && JSON.parse

const obj = {
  a: function () { },
  b: undefined,
  c: 1,
  d: 'd',
  f: [1,2,3]
}
if (!window.JSON) {
  window.JSON = {
    parse: function (jsonStr) {
      return eval('(' + jsonStr + ')');
    },
    stringify: function (jsonObj) {
      var result = '',
        curVal;
      if (jsonObj === null) {
        return String(jsonObj);
      }
      switch (typeof jsonObj) {
        case 'number':
        case 'boolean':
          return String(jsonObj);
        case 'string':
          return '"' + jsonObj + '"';
        case 'undefined':
        case 'function':
          return undefined;
      }

      switch (Object.prototype.toString.call(jsonObj)) {
        case '[object Array]':
          result += '[';
          for (var i = 0, len = jsonObj.length; i < len; i++) {
            curVal = JSON.stringify(jsonObj[i]);
            result += (curVal === undefined ? null : curVal) + ",";
          }
          if (result !== '[') {
            result = result.slice(0, -1);
          }
          result += ']';
          return result;
        case '[object Date]':
          return '"' + (jsonObj.toJSON ? jsonObj.toJSON() : jsonObj.toString()) + '"';
        case '[object RegExp]':
          return "{}";
        case '[object Object]':
          result += '{';
          for (i in jsonObj) {
            if (jsonObj.hasOwnProperty(i)) {
              curVal = JSON.stringify(jsonObj[i]);
              if (curVal !== undefined) {
                result += '"' + i + '":' + curVal + ',';
              }
            }
          }
          if (result !== '{') {
            result = result.slice(0, -1);
          }
          result += '}';
          return result;

        case '[object String]':
          return '"' + jsonObj.toString() + '"';
        case '[object Number]':
        case '[object Boolean]':
          return jsonObj.toString();
      }
    }
  };
}
console.log(JSON.stringify(obj))

4.call 或 apply

//call
Function.prototype.newCall = function(target, ...args) {
  // this 指向调用 newCall函数的对象
  if (typeof this !== "function") {
    throw new TypeError("not a function")
  }
  target = target || window
  target.fn = this // 隐式绑定，改变构造函数的调用者间接改变 this 指向
  return target.fn(...args)
};

let obj = { 
  name: 'radish' 
}
function foo(...args) {
  console.log(this.name, args)
}
let s = foo.newCall(obj, 'a', 'b')
// radish ['a', 'b']

//apply
Function.prototype.newApply = function(target, ...args) {
  // this 指向调用 newApply函数的对象
  if (typeof this !== "function") {
    throw new TypeError("not a function")
  }
  target = target || window
  target.fn = this // 隐式绑定，改变构造函数的调用者间接改变 this 指向
  args = arguments[1]
  return target.fn(...args)
};

let obj = { 
  name: 'radish' 
}
function foo(...args) {
  console.log(this.name, args)
}
let s = foo.newApply(obj, ['a', 'b'])

5.Object.create()

function _create(o){
  function F(){}
  F.prototype = o
  return new F()
}

const obj = {
  name: 'radish'
}
const a = _create(obj)
console.log('a', a.name) // radish

6.setTimeout模拟setInterval

function setInter(s,fn){
  let timeOut = (s,fn)=>{
      setTimeout(()=>{
        fn();
        timeOut(s,fn);
      },s)
  }
  timeOut(s,fn);
}
 
//调用上面的方法
setInter(3000,()=>{console.log("hello radish!")})

7.防抖

lodash debounce 地址： https://github.com/lodash/lodash/blob/master/debounce.js
